basic_details.job_title: NIO Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Oceanography (NIO) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Oceanography has released the official notification for 1 Project Associate - I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Goa. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Marine Sciences /Oceanography/ Marine Biology / Biological Oceanography and Biodiversity
qualification.details: M.Sc in Marine Sciences /Oceanography/ Marine Biology / Biological Oceanography and Biodiversity

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply for the NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIO Project Associate - I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIO Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIO Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply for the NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIO to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIO Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Associate - I position at NIO is 26th July 2026. Ensure all details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc degree in Marine Sciences, Oceanography, Marine Biology, or Biological Oceanography and Biodiversity to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate - I post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Associate - I position in the National Institute of Oceanography recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the NIO Project Associate - I recruitment must be submitted through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate - I at the National Institute of Oceanography is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is Goa, as indicated in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is GAP003704/3249-26.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this post?
faq.answer: While the job is located in Goa, the notification does not specify any state-wise restrictions for applications, so candidates from all eligible backgrounds can apply.
